wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

davila7/claude-code-templates.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

google-labs-code/stitch-skills.description: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.
